headline: iQor Gaming Veteran John Pompei to Lead Player Experience Panel at Live Service Gaming Summit North America
summary: Gaming Companies Are Transforming Fragmented Player Data Into Real-Time Intelligence to Drive Engagement, Retention, and Revenue Growth John Pompei John Pompei, iQor CXBPO Gaming Practice Lead FT. headline: ELECTRONIC ARTS INC (NASDAQ:EA) Flashes High-Growth Momentum Signals According to Minervini Screen
summary: Electronic Arts (EA) shows strong technical and fundamental momentum, passing the Mark Minervini Trend Template with accelerating earnings growth and a bullish consolidation pattern near highs.
